These babouches are traditional in style and are more decorative.

name: Tube Wicker Storage Trunk, Palm Leaf Storage Chest Basket
desc:
handmade tube wicker storage trunk made from palm leaves is a traditional Moroccan handicraft. It is a versatile and practical storage solution that can be used as a storage chest, storage basket, or even as a decorative accent piece.

The trunk is made by weaving together dried palm leaves into a tube shape, with a lid that can be easily removed for access to the contents inside. The natural color of the palm leaves gives the trunk a rustic and earthy feel, perfect for adding a touch of warmth to any room.

The trunk can be used to store a variety of items such as blankets, pillows, toys, books, or even as a laundry hamper. It is also lightweight and easy to move around, making it ideal for use in different areas of the house.

name: Wedding Heart Straw Basket - Beach Bags, Bridal Shower Bags
desc:

Approximately sized at 12x7x7", these handwoven bags boast unique variations in size and structure, reflecting the artistry of their creation. It's common for the back of the bag to have a slight slope where it meets the handles.
